_about: Beyond Buds PVSyst hourly prediction baseline (year 1). Values are kWh generated in each hour, P50/P90/P95 percentiles. Converted from watts in the source PVSyst export. Degradation: -2% year 1->2, then -0.5%/yr compounding from year 2. The processor applies the right factor per date using the system commissioning date (earliest data the API returns).
